meaning: adj.(英国作家)莎士比亚的,莎士比亚似的,莎士比亚作品[风格]的
examples: I had to insult him in Shakespearean English.
History has witnessed the endless productions of Shakespearean plays in every major language of the world.
The Shakespearean curse, "a plague on both your houses", would have had real resonance then.
When you ask which musicians have written music for a Shakespearean play, you get a pretty diverse list.
The heart-tugging scenes arrive on schedule, along with the Shakespearean rap number and marching drill.
